ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "week_end_date" TEXT /* Date the sales data was recorded */,
  "store_num" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sales data was recorded */,
  "upc" INTEGER /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the product sold */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits to the store */,
  "hhs" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "spend" REAL /* Total spend */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID of the product */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale was part of a promotion */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., loyal, new, occasional) */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., in-store, online) */,
  "return_units" INTEGER /* Number of units returned */,
  "return_spend" REAL /* Amount of money refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_upc FOREIGN KEY ("upc") REFERENCES products ("upc"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_num FOREIGN KEY ("store_num") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the store information was updated */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "upc" INTEGER /* Universal Product Code (UPC) of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media, in-store) */,
  "expected_reach" INTEGER /* Expected reach of the campaign */,
  "actual_reach" INTEGER /* Actual reach of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, buy one get one) */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "elligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for customers to be eligible for the promotion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the promotion information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
